description_long: This is a small, octagonal wooden cabin elevated on stilts, featuring a wide wooden porch that wraps around the front. The roof is a multi-faceted, tent-like structure with a decorative pattern in earthy tones and a blue-green vented cap topped by a sphere. Four prominent columns support the roof at the corners of the porch, and the main entrance is a wooden door with a carved design, flanked by lattice-style window panels. A narrow wooden walkway leads up to the porch, and a metal awning extends from one side, supported by thin poles. The cabin's exterior is finished in natural wood textures, with blue and orange accents on the roof and columns.
description: A small, octagonal wooden cabin with a patterned, multi-faceted roof, front porch, and decorative columns, elevated on stilts with a side metal awning.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with two columns, wooden walkway, and detailed roof pattern.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the metal awning on the left side and the back of the roof structure, with no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the wooden wall, two columns, and the side profile of the porch and roof.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back wall, columns, and the continuation of the porch structure.
attribute_roof_type: octagonal hip roof with decorative patterned panels and a central vented cap topped by a sphere
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows with lattice patterns flanking the main door on the front facade, symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch
